item.title: At a bare minimum, vote him out in the next election, Idaho
item.description: Here's the story: https://www.eastidahonews.com/2025/08/former-byu-baseball-starter-sentenced-for-sexually-assaulting-young-girl-for-5-years/ He didn't even require that the rapist be registered as a sex offender. I'm not saying we should make him as famous as the actual rapist, but it would be a shame if his professional reputation were tarnished by this egregious miscarriage of justice.

item.title: This is what a loser looks like.
item.dc:creator: mocosoft

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1464 (world's end)
item.description:
Bread, I guess. Take it or leave it. I don't care anymore.
I wish to punish this body with pain, and hunger for its betrayal.
Fell asleep during orientation. Got fired.
I didn't even realize it had fallen asleep.
Something is wrong with me, I don't know what it is, its clearly worse than sleep apnea, and I won't be able to solve it because American Healthcare.
It would be cheaper for me to buy a gun and blow my brains out than to get the care I clearly need for whatever my stupid piece of cocksucking shit ass motherfucking body is doing to make me fall asleep when I sit still.
At least it doesn't usually (? I now wonder about the Jeep incident, if it wasn't just Pippin having chewed a hole in the CPAP hose) happen when I'm driving.
I'm discouraged, depressed, and angry, but only at myself, because somehow I did this to myself and I want to take a knife to my body and stab and slice and cut and burn it into pieces and ashes.
I am indeed, as my first ex fiancée said when I was 21, "absolutely useless and worthless"
I never did get unemployment for the jeep shit, or for the failed two weeks at the meadery
I can't do anything. Except maybe rescue Acorn Woodpeckers.
Driving to work today, saw a male Acorn Woodpecker flopping around on the side of the road, stopped, saw he was hurt (and pissed) and hopping, but not flying, so I scooped him up in a bird bander's grip and continued driving to work
But he escaped into the dashboard of my car when I stopped to get him into the bird carrier I still had in the car, and I didn't have time to retrieve him, so I cracked the windows and hoped for the best. Still heard him when we adjourned for lunch, but no sign of him.
When I started driving home after being fired, i saw he somehow had ended up in the back seat, so I got him into the carrier (more angry screaming) and hurried over to the Prescott Heritage Zoo, which has a bird rehabilitation center. This is where he was left, and I drove angrily back home over the mountain in silence, contemplating gun prices.
The fact is, the kind of man who would rescue an Acorn Woodpecker and seemingly has narcolepsy is not valued by capitalism.
This world is not getting better. Nor will it, without collapsing first, which will kill a lot of people who are the sort who would stop in a road to pick up an injured Woodpecker, because they don't have the money to buy a safehouse and a ticket through disaster.
What optimism is had is... gone. The only message I've been able to parse from the great tree is basically a complete and utter indifference to both humanity and time.
If I wasn't white, suicide by cop would probably be the way to go.
Hey, look, it's the Vimes Boot Theory being basically USED FOR ADVERTISEMENT. Because FUCKING LATE STAGE CAPITALISM.
Nobody cares enough to overthrow the government, but maybe if I pour gasoline on myself and light myself on fire in just the right place, I can be a speedbump for sales somewhere, maybe in downtown Phoenix
I mean, shit, if I do it before September is put, the fire will feel like air conditioning compared to the regular air, and I'll be comfortable.
There is no justice, no righteousness. I think the Gnostics were right: no loving God created this universe. And frankly, I can't wait to leave it.
But apparently, I *can't* because it would make the world a worse place. So I'm trapped here when really, I would rather die.
Whatever. I have only 3,000 to my name and no hope of a new job or healthcare or anything so I may as well write a will and see who I can find to care for Pippin when my bitter end comes by my hand in a month or two.
There's no point anymore. Hell, I may not even post after today's. Why bother? Well, I know why bother--so hopefully, nobody else feels as hopeless or miserable or sad as I do--but I don't know if that changes anything.
I don't know what to do. Other than, maybe, perhaps, lay down and die.
Spread my ashes at Pando, I guess, because I won't be getting an Orthodox funeral or burial--but that doesn't matter.
Don't worry. Nothing is going to happen today if it does end up happening. There is too much paperwork to do, and I want the state to get as little as possible from me.
Shut up, Anselm
This. This is what AI is doing to our brains.
Robocop: Art Historian would be interesting.
I'm a failure of a human and fail everything, and if I survive all this, I think another lesson is never do anything for yourself nice because the universe will immediately balance itself again by making bad things happen to me.
We all know these assholes who can function without coffee in the morning.
Hey, it's me. It's all worries. It's never *not* going to be worries ever again until after I die, *maybe*. And if there truly is a Samsara, it's going to be worries all over again. And again. And again. I feel like I would be the idiot who, in another life, if those were a thing, would have been idiotic enough to take a vow to be a Bhodisattva, and now I'm stuck in this hellhole forever. (And then i have to remind myself that I don't believe in past lives)
We all know one......
The person I wish I was.
I didn't die in my sleep last night. Which sucks.
Just birding things.
Yeah, but you know how corporate is.
Currently fleeing right now
Accurate conure energy.
Well, GOOD NEWS THEN! I also absolutely loathe myself! Just like I hate this universe. I hate that I hate it.
I feel like this is the result that would happen if fellow wierdo @xbadxfaeriex and I ever spent a drunk night together. Just... a brood of witches and wizards hatching from eggs, possibly destroying several small towns.
When cannon are canon.
I remember the first time I heard wood thrushes sing when I lived in Boston. But I like the songs of Hermit Thrushes more.
I guess there are worse phases. Parents keep calling. I'm too embarrassed to answer. Indeed, honestly, half of the reason why I would like to die right now is sheer embarrassment at being unable to function at all. I don't know if I'll give up yet. I want to, though. Badly.
Pippin tax. He would not leave me alone last night, kept opening his cage door to crawl over into bed and into my shirt. But anyway. Today's message from Pippin: "Okay. Thank you. Ta-da. What happened?" ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: REPORT: Joseph Schnitt, acting deputy chief within United States DOJ says they'll "redact every Republican", leave every Democrat name on the Epstein list - also says Maxwell was moved to "keep her quiet".
item.description: Yes, I know. No shit Sherlock. Still gonna post this every day now until this hits the front page news internationally. https://www.timesnownews.com/world/us/us-news/who-is-joseph-schnitt-doj-official-caught-on-tape-by-steve-okeefe-project-veritas-making-explosive-claims-about-jeffrey-epstein-ghislaine-maxwell-article-152674711

item.dc:creator: DropDrop

item.title: After six years, it was time for a change.
item.description:
I've watched my hairline creep further and further back since 2019; it's thinned out on top and there's even a solid white streak in the back! It was time for a change.
It'll take some getting used to but WOW, do I feel so much cooler!
item.dc:creator: 2Booplesnoot2Flufferbuttle

Like what we do and how we do it? Leave a tip. Or don't. It's totally cool either way. Stay True & Stay Tuned - Meta Pathos

item.title: GovBrief Today #216
item.description: ?⚙️? The showy stuff sits in plain view while the real power grabs are offstage. Petty political theater like a White House flyover billed as a diplomatic tribute and a Rose Garden tech dinner without Musk is the distraction. What can’t be ignored is the machinery making it stick, from new Jan. 6 rewrite committees to new rules to jam nominees to fresh deportation gambits. Call your reps, tell them to back the court fights, and push your local officials to reinforce the guardrails now. And don’t leave truth to the algorithm. Our free and private nightly email arms you with images, data, and quotes so you can see it all for yourself. Add your email at govbrief dot today or on Substack at Gov Brief Today. #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com [1] https://go.govbrief.today/daily-wire-mayor-threat [2] https://go.govbrief.today/florida-vaccine-mandate-school [3] https://go.govbrief.today/new-cdc-vaccine-members [4] https://go.govbrief.today/west-coast-vaccine-alliance [5] https://go.govbrief.today/texas-abortion-pill-lawsuits [6] https://go.govbrief.today/venezuela-tps-revoked-again [7] https://go.govbrief.today/bondi-rule-change-asylum [8] https://go.govbrief.today/missouri-dominion-access-machines [9] https://go.govbrief.today/epstein-accusers-interrupted-flyover [10] https://go.govbrief.today/health-data-websites-reinstated [11] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-tech-dinner-thursday [12] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-chicago-new-orleans [13] https://go.govbrief.today/ronny-jackson-reinstated-admiral [14] https://go.govbrief.today/harvard-freeze-struck-down [15] https://go.govbrief.today/seventh-circuit-gun-rules [16] https://go.govbrief.today/utah-maps-redrawn-immediately [17] https://go.govbrief.today/two-gop-votes-epstein [18] https://go.govbrief.today/ice-center-at-angola [19] https://go.govbrief.today/rubio-drug-ships-destroy [20] https://go.govbrief.today/dc-guard-duty-extended [21] https://go.govbrief.today/wifi-hotspot-school-ban [22] https://go.govbrief.today/congress-stock-ban-house [23] https://go.govbrief.today/epstein-survivors-speak-out [24] https://go.govbrief.today/mciver-censure-voted-down [25] https://go.govbrief.today/new-jan6-house-committee [26] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-nominee-fast-track [27] https://go.govbrief.today/stephen-ehikian-exits-gsa [28] https://go.govbrief.today/hhs-employees-rfk-resign Hey, Imgur, a nap attack spirited me away yesterday so I'll be back online reading comments. Have a great Thursday.
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.dc:creator: Johje19

item.title: Unionized Italian dockworkers threaten to 'Shut down all of Europe' if Gaza aid is blocked.
item.description: That's what pissed me off so much with leftists years ago when I begged leftist influencers to focus vastly more on union building as a CORE way to empower the public to steer the government away from fascism (both foreign and domestic) Jane McAlevey should have been a fucking household name before she died, but the left shrugged and just kept attacking each other with silly fucking games instead of learning from that master in how to take over this country from the bottom-up. When the left didn't seem to comprehend how empowering her strategies were and simply ignored Jane, that's when I knew we were fucked. https://imgur.com/gallery/dangerous-aoc-deep-organizing-jane-mcalevey-47Mbn8n I would still recommend her books and videos today: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=bl6P_2jt_Vs&t=15s However, I'm tired of beating a dead fucking horse. This country is boiled. Fuck everyone on the left that decided to be fucking keyboard warrior cowards instead of fighting IRL with Jane's proven strategies. I'm fucking fed up with cowards. Now in Sept of 2025 I don't even remember the last time any leftist influencers had any real focus on union building in the USA. We are charbroiled. Step up, Americans. Stop being cowards.
item.dc:creator: cowicide

item.title: Age of Excess Dump #28 - back on bedrest phone dump
item.description:
I take no responsibility for the quality of the crops, I just harvest them. All sauce is Imgur and all views reflected in memes are representative of their original postings, not me who just steals them.
But they sure as fuck can run over my big toe two days ago...
item.dc:creator: LariCheltsy

item.title: Buying a cat statue for your kitty and ending up with two statues
item.dc:creator: unfitpoisoning

item.title: I had to ensure big fat bellies
item.description: Newest foster kittens Mario and Luigi barely ate breakfast this morning and I have been worried all day while I’ve been at work, so I came home for lunch. And just LOOK!! Big fat bellies for the win!! I’m confident it’s not worms because they were skinny this morning and fat now after stuffing their faces for ten minutes. We do still have two more days of worm medication so we’ll just cover all our bases. Ugh, I have to go back to work. But I’m so happy about Mario and Luigi!
item.dc:creator: KittensForDays

item.title: (Plugs in another fan) Fuck your data center
item.description: https://apnews.com/article/phantom-electricity-emissions-climate-carbon-efficiency-unplugging-534aba8eb6866e8244204b6362f37daa The AP article isn’t explicitly saying it’s because of the data centers, that’s just me being a salty asshole. But the author of article wants us to “unplug the devices that are not in use” to save on power. A. I was radicalized in the 90s by Captain Planet, we know the fucking stakes here. B. This isn’t a consumer problem, leave my 1000 watt microwave that warms up my cereal for 1 minute and 45 seconds out of this.
item.dc:creator: DownvotesStarWars

item.title: Meme dump without politics or bots vol 49
item.description:
EDIT: VOL 50 OF THESE DUMPS - WHICH MAY BE THE LAST ONE I POST - IS FOUND HERE: https://imgur.com/gallery/reupload-meme-dump-without-politics-bots-vol-50-ftxSucx ---- Oh Imgur. For a decade you've been my electronic living room. I've giggled, groaned and occasionally gotten all emotional. Mainly I've been here for the commentary. Now and then some world class cheek has been posted on this site. Well, this is my 49:th dump of memes without politics or bots and there might be a 50:th, too. But I do be reading the writing on the wall. Reminder: drink water, see the sun at least once today and rage, rage against the dying of the light. Vol 48 found here: https://imgur.com/gallery/meme-dump-without-politics-bots-vol-48-nwuOjHs Track of this dump: Capitãe da Areia – Afterclapp. https://open.spotify.com/track/0tsdTV5UgmLNGXiBRxdMdM
Art: Elan Harris.
A cocktail recipe someone taught me once - petrol, oil (motor oil but diesel works too), dish washing liquid (to mix them). Art: Cildo Meireles.
Art: Hatanaka.
Design: Adam Harvey. CV Dazzle is a form of camouflage from computer vision such as face detection algorithms and AI, while still remaining perceptible to human observers. https://adam.harvey.studio/cvdazzle
Art: Julia Tar.
You lost the game.
It is, isn't it?
item.dc:creator: NinjaCongo
